highlights: Built a technical analysis trading system with custom strategies and live market data delivering 20% returns.
Developed APIs for an AI-powered golf assistant app, improving prediction accuracy by 30%.
Designed real-time ingestion pipelines integrating Dhan APIs with 100% uptime during trading hours.
Worked as a Full Stack Developer across Greenr, Swift Alpha, Jupito, and Swingo projects.
Built responsive dashboards for multiple internal projects including Greenr using React and Next.js.
Created reusable UI components and layouts to support rapid feature development.
Implemented REST APIs and collaborated closely with backend engineers for seamless integration.
Wrote and executed API test cases using Postman to validate functionality and edge cases.

technical_projects.title: Golf Swing Analysis App (Swingo)
metrics: Improved gRPC endpoints, reducing app-server latency by 20%.
Optimized AI prompts and data flow, increasing swing analysis accuracy by 15-20%.
Collaborated with senior developers and designers, improving development speed by 30%.

education.details: Self-taught development using online resources, focusing on modern web stacks and real-time systems.
